positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical celestial forest scene. The composition features stylized, bioluminescent flora growing among intertwined constellations and nebulae. Main elements include stylized crescent moons, intricate zodiac glyphs formed by glowing vines, and geometric representations of distant planets. The artwork must have a strong, graphic silhouette and high contrast, utilizing a limited color palette of deep indigo, electric teal, gold leaf accents, and cosmic purple. Style is a mix of sacred geometry and modern botanical illustration, rendered with sharp, clean lines and perfect symmetry, suitable for direct apparel printing. Central composition, ethereal glow.
